chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 320 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________  For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 None present This reference application is pending since 2018 without any significant progress. Even today learned Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone-I is unrepresented. It appears that the applicant is not interested in pursuing this matter, therefore, in view of the judgment of Supreme Court reported as PLD 2020 SC 518 (Commissioner of Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited), instant reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
